introSection: Lil' Phantom is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. Added in 1996, the ride was manufactured by Molina & Son's. The ride was rehabbed, overhauled, and rebuilt completely for the 2007 season.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has an oval layout.

fullText:
Lil' Phantom is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. Added in 1996, the ride was manufactured by Molina & Son's. The ride was rehabbed, overhauled, and rebuilt completely for the 2007 season.

The ride has an oval layout.
